recommendations.title: Coffee and Cigarettes
recommendations.overview: An anthology of eleven vignettes featuring star-studded casts of extremely unique individuals who all share the common activities of conversing while drinking coffee and smoking cigarettes.

recommendations.title: Night on Earth
recommendations.overview: A quintet of cabbies in five cities and their remarkable fares on the same eventful night.

recommendations.title: Down by Law
recommendations.overview: A disc jockey, a pimp and an Italian tourist escape from jail in New Orleans.

recommendations.title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai
recommendations.overview: A Black hitman who models after the samurai of old finds himself targeted for death by the mob.

recommendations.title: Dead Man
recommendations.overview: On the run after committing murder, an accountant encounters a strange Native American man who prepares him for his journey into the spiritual world.

recommendations.title: Paterson
recommendations.overview: A week in the life of Paterson, a poet bus driver, and his wife Laura, a very creative artist, who live in Paterson, New Jersey, hometown of many famous poets and artists.

recommendations.title: Only Lovers Left Alive
recommendations.overview: A depressed musician reunites with his lover. However, their romance, already played over several centuries, is disrupted by the arrival of her uncontrollable younger sister.

recommendations.title: Permanent Vacation
recommendations.overview: In downtown Manhattan, twentysomething Allie, whose father is not around and whose mother is institutionalized, is a big Charlie Parker fan. He almost subconsciously searches for meaning in his life and meets some idiosyncratic characters along the w

recommendations.title: Pinocchio
recommendations.overview: Roberto Benigni adapts the classic children's tale by Carlo Collodi for the big-budget family-oriented comedy Pinocchio.

recommendations.title: The Dead Don't Die
recommendations.overview: In the sleepy town of Centerville, the lives of a number of interconnected characters are disrupted by the undead.
